checkout__success__body: We'll email a confirmation in a moment. Watch this page or your inbox for production and shipping updates.
checkout__success__pending_body: Payment received. Your order is being finalized and will appear in your orders shortly.
checkout__success__toast_order: Order placed — confirmation on the way.
checkout__loading__body: Securely connecting to our payment provider. This usually takes just a few seconds — please don't close this window.
checkout__cancel__body: You stepped away before completing payment, so nothing was billed. Your draft order #{id} stays available — pick it back up whenever you're ready.
